name: Cooking
description: Prepare food and consumables at the Stove station. Cooked foods raise your maximum health, focus, and stamina beyond base values, giving crafters and explorers a lasting edge.

nodes.name: Cooking
nodes.description: Foundation of the Cooking profession. Unlocks access to the Stove station and grants basic food recipes.

nodes.name: Foods
nodes.description: Learn to prepare foods that extend your maximum health, stamina, and focus beyond base limits. Cooked food buffs persist until you eat again.

nodes.name: Fruit Jam
nodes.description: Craft Fruit Jam from 10 units of any fruit. When eaten, boosts your maximum Focus — letting you sustain more active skills simultaneously.

nodes.name: Meat Kabob
nodes.description: Craft Meat Kabob from 10 units of any meat. When eaten, boosts your maximum Health — increasing how much damage you can sustain.

nodes.name: Mushroom Patty
nodes.description: Craft Mushroom Patty from 10 units of any fungus. When eaten, boosts your maximum Stamina — extending how long you can sprint and exert yourself.

nodes.name: Preservation
nodes.description: Advanced food preservation techniques. Extends the duration of food buffs and allows stacking cooked goods for long expeditions.

nodes.name: Fine Cuisine
nodes.description: Master-level cooking. Produces higher-quality food with stronger and longer-lasting buffs. Requires access to rare ingredients.
